```markdown
# [CHECKLIST TYPE]: [FEATURE NAME]

## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK001 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK002 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK003 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK004 Another category item
- [ ] CHK005 Item with specific criteria
- [ ] CHK006 Final item in this category
```

> **Note to agents**: The sample items above are for illustration only. Replace them with actual items based on spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md. Do not include a `## Notes` section, `**Purpose**` field, `**Note**` field, or HTML comments in the generated checklist — keep the file lean for downstream gate checks.
